result.reason: Shortcut conflicts arise from hardcoded System.Windows.Forms.Keys comparisons that don't account for national keyboard layouts or AltGr key behavior, particularly in ProcessCmdKey overrides.
result.approach: Modify ProcessCmdKey implementations in BaseWindow.cs and FrmMain.Designer.cs to use KeyEventArgs.KeyCode for the primary key and KeyEventArgs.Modifiers for modifier keys, allowing for more precise and locale-independent shortcut detection. Re-evaluate the Keys.Alt | Keys.Menu check in FrmMain.Designer.cs.
